message:
deps: bump bitflags 2.9.0 -> 2.11.1

Minor bump within 2.x. bitflags 2.10/2.11 added #[repr(transparent)] hints
and a `from_bits_retain` family of const fns. No changes here use those,
and the existing `bitflags!` invocations remain source-compatible.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ doc_markdown = { level = "allow", priority = 1 }
 # External dependencies
 anyhow = "1.0.102"
 arc-swap = "1.9.1"
-bitflags = "2.9.0"
+bitflags = "2.11.1"
 blake3 = "1.6.0"
 clap = { version = "4.5.0", features = ["derive"] }
 crc32c = "0.6.8"
